title: User defined types declared with initializer use continuous instead of procedural assignment

features.name: typedef-typed variable with inline initializer and always_ff driver
features.description: Code should include a user-defined typedef type variable declared with an inline initializer combined with an always_ff block that drives the same variable, so that the initializer must be lowered to a procedural initial assignment rather than a continuous assign

features.name: simple typedef logic alias
features.description: Code should include a typedef that creates a simple alias for the logic type, then declares a variable using that alias

features.name: variable inline initializer semantic equivalence to initial block
features.description: Code should include a reg/logic variable declared with an inline initializer to verify it is semantically equivalent to a separate initial block assignment, not a continuous assign
